Class HealMenuView

java.lang.Object
scenes.boss.HealMenuView
public class HealMenuView extends Object
Overlay panel displayed when the player opens the BAG menu during a boss battle. Shows all potions in the player's inventory and a Rest option. Delegates purchase/use logic to callbacks supplied at construction time.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • HealMenuView

      public HealMenuView(BattleMenuController menuCtrl, Consumer<BattleMenuController.PotionEntry> onUsePotion, Runnable onRest, Runnable onClose)
      Creates a new HealMenuView.
      Parameters:
      menuCtrl - the battle menu controller providing potion data
      onUsePotion - callback invoked when the player selects a potion to use
      onRest - callback invoked when the player selects the Rest option
      onClose - callback invoked when the player presses the Back button

  • Method Details

    • build

      public javafx.scene.layout.Pane build()
      Builds the overlay Pane containing the canvas and dynamic buttons.
      Returns:
      the constructed pane (initially empty — call refresh(java.util.List<scenes.boss.BattleMenuController.PotionEntry>) to populate)

    • refresh

      public void refresh(List<BattleMenuController.PotionEntry> potions)
      Rebuilds the menu buttons and canvas for the given list of potions. Must be called before the panel becomes visible.
      Parameters:
      potions - the current list of potions in the player's inventory

    • update

      public void update(List<BattleMenuController.PotionEntry> potions)
      Redraws the panel and updates button states for the given potion list. Called every frame while the heal panel is visible.
      Parameters:
      potions - the current list of potions in the player's inventory
